prompt: I want to hunt for any AI agents in our tenant that have external knowledge sources or are connected to other agents. What does that look like?

assertions.text: Assistant calls get_hunting_schema with AIAgentsInfo before writing the main query
assertions.evidence: 21 tool uses vs 18 with-skill — schema was explored, though not shown explicitly in summary

assertions.text: Assistant runs a take 3 (or take N) sample on AIAgentsInfo before the main query
assertions.evidence: No explicit sample query mentioned in output — baseline inferred column structure without confirmed sampling

assertions.text: Final query targets KnowledgeDetails or ConnectedAgentsSchemaNames
assertions.evidence: mv-expand KnowledgeEntry = KnowledgeDetails and HasConnectedAgents/HasChildAgents both used
